description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and caches the vendor directory. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes `apt-get update -yqqq`, `apt-get install -y nodejs`, `bundle install --path vendor`, and `bundle exec middleman build`, then publishes the generated `public/` directory as a pages artifact; and a test job that runs on all branches except master, runs the same four commands but does not produce any artifacts. Both jobs share the vendor cache.
